{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Aetheric circle
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|An [[Aetheric circle]] can cover a system and is maintained by casters.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
